Reply with exactly: Ollama is working

I couldn't find any specific news articles or updates from today regarding OpenAI. The latest search results are from February 2023.

However, you can check the following websites for the latest OpenAI news:

* Reuters: https://www.reuters.com/technology/openai/
* OpenAI official website: https://openai.com/news/
* OpenTools AI News: https://opentools.ai/news
* Just AI News: https://justainews.com/category/companies/openai/
* WinBuzzer: https://winbuzzer.com/ai/openai/

Please note that these sources may not have real-time updates, and their information may be from previous days or weeks.
